body.title: CLOSED: ADC nighttime auditor — daily action log review + channel summary
body.result: nighttime_auditor.py; anomaly detection + channel summary; 9 tests
body.description:
No component reviews what action tools have been doing autonomously. As shell_exec, file_rw, and file_ticket are used by devices without human oversight, a daily summary and anomaly report is essential for confidence.

Proposed shape: Add `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/nighttime_auditor.py`. Reads adc.action_log for last 24h; groups by tool_name; identifies: call volume per tool, failed executions (exit_code != 0), large file writes (> 100KB), tickets filed autonomously, and any tool called > 50 times (potential loop). Generates a plain-text summary; posts to 'shared' channel via channel_send (author='librarian-auditor'). Scheduling: 24h background thread started at Librarian MCP server init; sleeps until next 02:00-04:00 local window, then fires. Add `start_nighttime_auditor()` call in mcp_server.py serve() on first initialize.

**Affected files:** new `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/nighttime_auditor.py`, update `agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/mcp_server.py`
**Design rules:** no-TheIgors-imports; no-sqlite; posts exactly one channel message per run
**Scope boundary:** reads action_log only; posts one summary; never modifies or deletes log entries. Only fires when action_log has > 0 entries for the window.
**Test plan:** mock action_log rows; verify summary message shape; verify channel_send called once with correct author; verify thread starts on mcp_server initialize.
